en: There's not sibling violence like there once was.
Back in the day, we could only play outside for so long
until we'd look at our brother and we'd go,
you know what, I'm gonna send it, man.
And your mother would go, why did you do that?
You'd go, because you gave us sidewalk chalk
and we have a gravel driveway.
I made a business decision, that was a lot more fun.
And as you can see, I did fold him.
